description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat, extended roof covering both the main living area and a carport. The front yard is landscaped with a paved walkway, a trellis with climbing plants, and a driveway leading to a covered parking area. The backyard is enclosed by a white fence and includes several mature trees, a hammock, and a small garden plot. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the exterior walls, providing ample natural light to the interior rooms. The structure is primarily constructed from light-colored materials, with visible wooden and concrete elements. The overall design is modern and functional, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and practical living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, carport, landscaped front yard, and a fenced backyard featuring trees and a hammock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, paved walkway, trellis, and partial interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, mature trees, hammock, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, garden plot, and additional windows along the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
